name: maestro-agora
description: Maestro: Agora turns verified product truth into concise, argument-first copy across written and spoken channels.

interface.shortDescription: Evidence-led, argument-first copy across every channel
interface.longDescription: Install Maestro: Agora in Codex for a direct /agora skill that turns supplied product truth and proof into concise marketing, sales, editorial, outreach, interface, and spoken copy while preserving claim limits.
defaultPrompt: /agora Rewrite this page around one defensible argument and CTA.
/agora Shorten this copy without losing proof or qualifications.
/agora Draft a spoken script from the verified facts below.
